poxing.d: p. pr. & vb. n. of Pox

poxvirus.d: n any of a group of viruses that can cause pox diseases in vertebrates

poxviruses.d: n. any of a group of viruses that can cause pox diseases in vertebrates

poxy.t: a. 微不足道的；渺小的；低劣的

poy.t: abbr. pre-oriented yarn 预先定向的聚酯纱线; 泰国著名变性女艺人, 17岁成功变性成美女
poy.d:
n. A support; -- used in composition; as, teapoy.
n. A ropedancer's balancing pole.
n. A long boat hook by which barges are propelled against the
   stream.

poynor.t: [人名] 波伊纳; [地名] [美国] 波伊诺

poyntel.d:

poynter.t: [人名] [英格兰人姓氏] 波因特 Pointer的变体

poynting correction.t: [化] 坡印亭校正; 坡印亭因子

poyser.t: [人名] [英格兰人姓氏] 波伊泽 Peyzer的变体

pozsony.d: n capital and largest city of Slovakia

n. Volcanic ashes from Pozzuoli, in Italy, used in the
